@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-871-add-opentelemetry-project-roadmap",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry: Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap ",
+    "description": "Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap . Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nhelm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry\n```\nIn my discussions with end-users and developers, a question I get asked often is about the OpenTelemetry roadmap, release plan and what's in development."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap ",
+        "description": "This is an attempt to catalog existing workstreams and combine this with the [results of the roadmap brainstorming sessions that we held at the last two Kubecon events](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jt47KPwgDG_-4kR4J5GtFSCEhQO3CHgUdAwpCKTQHO8/edit#), so that we can better broadcast the project's major workstreams and releases to community members and to the people who use or follow OpenTelemetry.\n\nPlease comment and propose edits as your see fit!\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add OpenTelemetry project roadmap \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is an attempt to catalog existing workstreams and combine this with the [results of the roadmap brainstorming sessions that we held at the last two Kubecon events](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jt47KPwgDG_-4kR4J5GtFSCEhQO3CHgUdAwpCKTQHO8/edit#), so that we can better broadcast the project's major workstreams and releases to community members and to the people who use or follow",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/community/issues/871",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/community",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/community/pull/1312"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:48:54.194Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
